items.headline_en: Openai Campus Network Student Club Interest Form
items.summary_en: OpenAI newsroom changed. Most visible article: "Openai Campus Network Student Club Interest Form".
items.evidence_excerpt: title=OpenAI Campus Network: Student club interest form published=Mon, 11 May 2026 10:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/openai-campus-network-student-club-interest-form description=Join the OpenAI Campus Network—connect student clubs worldwide, access AI tools, host events, and build an AI-powered campus community. title=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT published=Thu, 07 May 2026 00:00:00 GMT link=https://openai.com/index/introducing-trusted-contact-in-chatgpt description=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, an optional safety feature that notifies someone you trust if serious self-harm concerns are detected. title=GPT-5.5 Instant System Card link=https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-5-instant-system-card description=
diff_excerpt: description=How enterprises scale AI: from early experiments to compounding impact through trust, governance, workflow design, and quality at scale.
+title=OpenAI Campus Network: Student club interest form
+description=Join the OpenAI Campus Network—connect student clubs worldwide, access AI tools, host events, and build an AI-powered campus community.
description=Explore new realtime voice models in the OpenAI API that can reason, translate, and transcribe speech, enabling more natural and intelligent voice experiences.
+description=Introducing Trusted Contact in ChatGPT, an optional safety feature that notifies someone you trust if serious self-harm concerns are detected.
description=OpenAI introduces MRC (Multipath Reliable Connection), a new supercomputer networking protocol released via OCP to improve resilience and performance in large-scale AI training clusters.
-title=GPT-5.5 Instant: smarter, clearer, and more personalized
-description=GPT-5.5 Instant updates ChatGPT’s default model with smarter, more accurate answers, reduced hallucinations, and improved personalization controls.
title=Advancing youth safety and wellbeing in EMEA
description=OpenAI and PwC are partnering to help enterprises use AI agents to automate finance workflows, improve forecasting, strengthen controls, and modernize the CFO function.
-title=How OpenAI delivers low-latency voice AI at scale
-description=How OpenAI rebuilt its WebRTC stack to power real-time Voice AI with low latency, global scale, and seamless conversational turn-taking.
